metadata.description: EN: Community marketplace for the aprende plugin — a learning skill that turns conversations into durable learnings (memories, anti-pattern lessons, skill stubs, project-docs) with confirmation-first writes. ES: Marketplace comunitario para el plugin aprende — un skill de aprendizaje que convierte conversaciones en aprendizajes durables con confirmación primero.

plugins.name: aprende
plugins.description: Reflect on the current conversation and save reusable learnings across four categories (memory, lesson, skill stub, project-doc) — confirmation-first, Reflexion-style anti-patterns, dual-write to CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md for Codex compatibility.
plugins.author: Hainrixz
